content:
Dear God,

Once again, it's the problem of misunderstanding. Or was I trying too hard to understand? It seems everything I tried to do contains some kind of trigger that leads to the "discomfort". (I don't know which word to choose for the occasion.)

Or did I try too hard to please? Probably not hard enough.

And once again I snapped. I tried to hold it together as long as I could. But since I'm one of your creation, you might also know that I do have a limit.  

So here we're at this situation again, the brink of destruction (I think I like this name already). This happens every so often I feel like it's part of being "a family" already. That is bad, I presume.

But if this is a part of your test, please don't make it too difficult. Please take it easy on the "how strong are they?" kind of question.

However if it's your will to keep the tough love, I have no objection. I will try my best to pass it. I promise I will keep on trying. I promise I will not be the one who ends this.

I'll always treasure this greatest gift from you, a family.   

Talk to you later.

P.S. I hope you don't mind I post this online. I think it'll help with my rating. ;)
